message:
feat(freeze): Add define_private_field opcode Zig support

Convert define_private_field opcode to support both C and Zig output.
This opcode defines (initializes) a private field on an object.

Stack effect: [obj, name, val] -> [val] (pops 2, keeps val)

Implementation:
- Pops val, name, and obj from stack
- Calls JS_FrozenDefinePrivateField helper function
- Frees name reference
- On error: frees obj and returns exception
- On success: pushes val back to stack
- In Zig: uses block expressions for POP
- In C: uses POP() macro and FROZEN_FREE
